description: Bridge content.v2 exports into frontend-consumable artifacts for video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab, without reworking already-stabilized generators.
notes: 2026-04-25 audit: content-pipeline already has core/i18n split emission logic for learning_library (e04a3f3) and video sync helpers exist. Do not reimplement stable exporters.
Current risk is frontend consumption still pointing at legacy manifest/package shapes; keep this task focused on the remaining export-contract and sync gap.

tasks.desc: Audit the current pipeline outputs and mark which domains already emit content.v2 artifacts (video, sentence bank, dictionary, knowledge lab) versus which still point at legacy wrappers.
notes: 2026-04-25 audit: learning_library already emits tools/modular-viewer/data/library_manifest.json plus runtime knowledge/example_sentence outputs; content-pipeline also has core/i18n split emission logic and video sync helpers. Frontend still reads legacy manifest.json paths.

tasks.desc: Freeze the canonical frontend export contract: core/i18n file ownership, manifest filename(s), and domain-specific output roots for video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab.

Verify or extend the missing export/sync adapter(s) in content-pipeline / release-aggregator only where gaps remain, so content.v2 artifacts land in frontend-consumable core/i18n locations without rewriting already-stable generators.
Wire the frontend intake consumer(s) to the exported artifacts and preserve a safe fallback path to legacy assets during rollout.
Run smoke verification across video, sentence bank, dictionary, and knowledge lab outputs, then record any remaining legacy-path fallbacks and gaps.
